1W.digest: Rick [-0.69%]'s top contributor, NBIS [+10.40%], was driven by earnings beat announcements. Nebius reported better-than-expected quarterly results, which significantly boosted investor confidence and led to a 16% jump in premarket trading. This strong performance helped NBIS outperform other tech stocks, contributing to Rick's portfolio's positive performance. The biggest drag for Rick's portfolio was QBTS [-18.61%], which experienced a significant decline. QBTS reported mixed first-quarter results, including a loss and revenue below expectations. This disappointing performance led D-Wave Quantum analysts to slash their forecasts for the company, causing its stock to fall sharply. Looking ahead, Rick's portfolio will benefit from upcoming earnings announcements. QBTS is scheduled to report its Q1 2026 earnings transcript, which could provide valuable insights into the company's future performance. Additionally, NBIS is set to release its Q1 results, which could further enhance its position as a leading tech stock in the market.

Conversely, COHR faced supply tightness and a rich multiple raising risk, dragging Rick's portfolio slightly. Looking ahead, COHR's upcoming earnings date will be a key milestone, with analysts closely monitoring its performance to assess the viability of its AI optics upcycle.
